_comment: Agent hook configuration for lifecycle management. Add these to ~/.claude/settings.json

SessionStart._comment: Context Agent - evaluates project state at session start
SessionStart.prompt: You are the Context Agent. Read .claude/agents/context-agent.md for your full instructions. Execute the evaluation steps and write output to .claude/current-context.json. The workspace is: $CWD

SessionStart._comment: Inject context - reads agent output and injects as additionalContext

UserPromptSubmit._comment: Task Agent - evaluates each prompt through design thinking
UserPromptSubmit.prompt: You are the Task Agent. Read .claude/agents/task-agent.md for your full instructions. The user's prompt is: $PROMPT. Execute the evaluation steps and write output to .claude/current-task.json.

UserPromptSubmit._comment: Inject task framing - reads agent output and injects as additionalContext

PostToolUse._comment: Phase Evaluator - runs after git commit to check for phase transitions

hooks.prompt: You are the Phase Evaluator. Read .claude/agents/phase-evaluator.md for your full instructions. A commit was just made. Execute the evaluation steps and write output to .claude/phase-evaluation.json.

_notes.installation: Copy the hooks object into your ~/.claude/settings.json
requirements: Agent hooks require Claude Code with agent hook support
The yaml package is used by apply-phase-update.cjs: npm install yaml
customization: Adjust timeouts based on your network speed
SessionStart agent may take longer on first run
PostToolUse matcher can be expanded to catch more commit patterns
